creator: zlei@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #5)
> To submitter: is this aging PR still relevant?

I did a quick test on 13.4-RELEASE-p1 and stable/14, the MAC address from arp table is synced with the corresponding interface when changing the interface's ether address. I believe the issue has been fixed.

Closing now.
